creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193422
py-google-api-python-client-1.6.7.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-google-api-python-client to 1.6.7 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/google/google-api-python-client/compare/v1.6.1...v1.6.7

Changes to the port:
- DJANGO option uses Django 1.11 instead of Django 1.8
- added LICENSE_FILE
- added NO_ARCH
- sorted variables a bit

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
